title: Faster R-CNN: Towards Real-Time Object Detection with Region Proposal Networks
authors: Shaoqing Ren, Kaiming He, Ross Girshick, Jian Sun
hook: Imagine a neural network that spots objects in images almost instantly.
promise: You will understand how Faster R-CNN unified object detection into a fast, trainable system using region proposal networks.
prerequisite_note: Bring a sense of how neural nets process images and how detecting objects is different from just classifying them.

glossary.plain: A suggested area in an image that might contain an object.
A neural network that quickly predicts promising object regions in an image.
Patterns detected in an image by early layers of a convolutional neural network.
A number showing how likely a region contains any object.
An earlier system that detects objects using precomputed region proposals.
Training the entire detection system together, so all parts improve at once.

cards.title: Object detection, accelerated
body: See how Faster R-CNN made spotting objects in images both faster and smarter.

cards.title: The bottleneck in finding objects
body: Imagine looking at a photo and quickly circling every car, person, or dog. Computers need to do this too, but it used to be slow.
Earlier systems carefully searched for promising regions first, then checked them for objects. This region proposal step became the slowest part, holding everything back.

cards.title: How Faster R-CNN flows
body: First, a convolutional network scans the whole image, building a feature map that highlights interesting patterns.
Next, the Region Proposal Network uses these features to suggest where objects might be, directly and rapidly.
Finally, another part of the network classifies these regions and refines the object boundaries, all in a single streamlined process.
cards.caption: The whole image is processed once, then reused for both proposing and detecting objects.

cards.title: Region proposals: before and after
body: Toggle to see how object detection changed with Faster R-CNN.
cards.offNote: External algorithms slowly generate regions, adding time and complexity.
cards.onNote: A neural network proposes regions instantly, sharing image features with detection.

cards.title: The region proposal network trick
body: The breakthrough was making region proposals part of the neural network itself, instead of relying on a completely separate algorithm.
By letting the detection network and the proposal network share the same image features, the system became much faster and could be trained as a whole.

cards.title: How many proposals?
body: Adjust the number of region proposals per image and see how speed and accuracy shift.
cards.low: Very fast but may miss some objects.
cards.mid: Balanced: fast and accurate with about 300 proposals.
cards.high: Slow and redundant, but almost never misses an object.

cards.title: What goes into Faster R-CNN?
body: Pick which components are essential for the Faster R-CNN detection pipeline.

choices.label: ROI pooling
choices.note: Aligns proposed regions to a fixed size.

choices.label: Bounding box regressor
choices.note: Refines the edges of each detected object.

choices.label: End-to-end training
choices.note: Lets the whole system learn together.

cards.title: Detection speed and accuracy leap
body: Faster R-CNN delivered benchmark-leading accuracy on PASCAL VOC and COCO, while running much faster than previous systems.
By merging region proposals into the neural network, it enabled real-time object detection and inspired a new wave of research.
cards.caption: Faster R-CNN set new standards for both speed and accuracy in object detection.

cards.title: A foundation for modern vision
body: By making region proposals part of the neural network, Faster R-CNN unified object detection into a single, trainable system.
Its influence can be seen in nearly every modern object detector, making it a foundational step in computer vision.

recap.label: Extract
recap.note: Scan the image for features with a convolutional net.

recap.label: Propose
recap.note: Use an RPN to suggest promising regions.

recap.label: Classify
recap.note: Identify objects and refine their locations.

recap.label: Train
recap.note: Let the whole system learn together, end to end.

cards.title: Faster R-CNN: Towards Real-Time Object Detection with Region Proposal Networks
